seoTitle: Ensay North vs Epping — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Ensay North vs Epping: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ensay North and Epping.
heading: Ensay North vs Epping — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ensay North, Victoria and Epping, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Epping has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Ensay North (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ensay North or Epping safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ensay North has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Epping scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ensay North scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Epping scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ensay North or Epping?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Epping has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
